plan.name: AI Knowledge and Analytics Assistant Delivery Plan
plan.description: Delivery roadmap for the DT602/DT603 AI Knowledge and Analytics Assistant proof of concept. The plan shows User Stories, Features and Epics across the planned sprint timeline.
